name: signal-hunt
description: Offline Windows trade-show touchscreen lottery app for Quantum Design.
author: Quantum Design

scripts.electron:prepare: npm run electron:check-node && npm run build && npm run electron:compile && node scripts/clean-electron-output.mjs
scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron .
scripts.electron:package: npm run electron:prepare && electron-forge package && npm run electron:verify -- package
scripts.electron:make: npm run electron:prepare && electron-forge make && npm run electron:verify -- make
scripts.verify:quick: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.verify:release: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:stress && npm run build
scripts.verify:desktop: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:electron && npm run electron:build
scripts.verify:onsite: npm run verify:release && npm run burnin:short && npm run preflight
